steps.title: Identify the student's requirement
steps.content: The student explicitly wants to emphasize a difference between the two approaches—so the answer must contrast them, not describe just one approach or stress their similarities.

steps.title: Find the contrasting choice
steps.content:
D does this with “substitutes a natural, plant-based substance for the hazardous chemicals,” directly showing how Rai's method differs from the traditional approach.
  • A highlights similarity
  • B describes only nanocellulose without comparison
  • C covers only the traditional method
.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
